Website Redesign & Migration

Complete website redesign and migration services to modernize your digital presence, improve performance, and enhance user experience.

Service Overview

Website redesign and migration services help businesses transform their outdated digital presence into modern, high-performing websites that drive results. Whether you're migrating from legacy platforms or completely reimagining your brand's online experience, I provide comprehensive solutions that prioritize performance, accessibility, and user experience.

What's Included

Discovery & Strategy

  • Current website audit and performance analysis
  • User research and competitor analysis
  • Technical requirements assessment
  • Migration planning and timeline development

Design & Development

  • Modern, responsive web design
  • Performance optimization
  • SEO-friendly architecture
  • Cross-browser compatibility testing

Migration Services

  • Content migration and optimization
  • URL structure planning and 301 redirects
  • Database migration (if applicable)
  • Third-party integrations setup

Post-Launch Support

  • Performance monitoring
  • Bug fixes and adjustments
  • Training and documentation
  • Ongoing maintenance options

Technologies & Platforms

I work with various platforms and technologies including:

  • Modern Frameworks: React, Next.js, Gatsby
  • CMS Platforms: Webflow, WordPress, Contentful, Sanity
  • E-commerce: Shopify, WooCommerce, custom solutions
  • Static Site Generators: 11ty, Hugo, Jekyll

Process

  1. Discovery Phase - Understanding your current setup and future goals
  2. Planning & Strategy - Creating a comprehensive migration plan
  3. Design & Development - Building your new website
  4. Testing & QA - Ensuring everything works perfectly
  5. Migration & Launch - Seamless transition to your new site
  6. Post-Launch Support - Monitoring and optimization

Typical Timeline

Most website redesign and migration projects take 6-12 weeks, depending on complexity and scope. I'll provide a detailed timeline during the discovery phase.

Frequently Asked Questions

Most website redesign projects take 6-12 weeks, depending on the complexity and scope. This includes discovery, design, development, testing, and launch phases. I'll provide a detailed timeline specific to your project during our initial consultation.

No, your current website will remain live and functional throughout the entire redesign process. I develop the new site in a staging environment, and we only switch over once everything is thoroughly tested and approved. The actual migration typically takes just a few hours with minimal downtime.

Absolutely! Content migration is a core part of my redesign service. I can migrate your existing content, optimize it for better SEO, and ensure everything is properly formatted in your new design. I also help identify opportunities to improve and update content during the process.

I take great care to preserve and improve your SEO during the redesign process. This includes proper 301 redirects, maintaining URL structure where possible, optimizing page speed, and ensuring all technical SEO elements are properly implemented. Most clients see improved rankings after launch.

Yes! I provide comprehensive training on your new content management system, including how to add/edit content, manage images, and perform basic maintenance tasks. I also provide documentation and am available for ongoing support questions.

I provide 30 days of complimentary post-launch support to address any issues or minor adjustments. For ongoing maintenance, content updates, or additional features, I offer flexible support packages tailored to your needs.

Ready to Transform Your Website?

Let's discuss your website redesign and migration needs and create a plan that delivers results.
